RankingPolicy.description: Top-level ranking policy attached via POLICY_TYPE_RANKING_POINTS. Defines how tournament results are converted to ranking points.

validDateRange.description: Date range during which this entire policy is valid

awardProfiles.description: Ordered list of award profiles. Profile selection uses specificity scoring; when tied, array order is the tiebreaker.

qualityWinProfiles.description: Bonus point profiles for wins against ranked opponents

aggregationRules.description: Controls how per-tournament PointAwards are aggregated into a ranking list

requireWinForPoints.description: Global default: participant must have at least one win to earn points. Overridable per-profile.

requireWinFirstRound.description: Global default: participant must win their first-round match to earn points. Overridable per-profile.

doublesAttribution.description: How to attribute doubles/pair points to individual rankings

categoryResolution.description: How to resolve category when matching profiles. 'eventCategory' (default) uses event.category + event.gender. 'participantPrimary' uses participant's primary category scale.

tierToLevel.description: Maps TierClassification (system + value) to numeric ranking levels.

pointPoolModel.description: How results contribute to ranking lists. 'per-category' (default): each list computed from awards filtered to its category, with optional categoryAggregation rules. 'shared': one pool feeds every age-eligible list (Tennis Canada paradigm); categoryAggregation is not evaluated.

derivedRankings.description: Ranking lists that are filtered views of another list (ČTS's U16 = U18 filtered).

AwardProfile.description: Defines how points are awarded for a specific scope (event type, draw type, level, category, etc.). Extends AwardProfileScope with point definitions.

finishingPositionRanges.description: Points by finishing position. Key = max finishingPositionRange value (1=champion, 2=finalist, 4=semifinalist, etc.). Value is a PositionValue.

finishingRound.description: Alternative to finishingPositionRanges: awards based on round number with separate won/lost values.

perWinPoints.description: Points per match won. Single definition or array for multiple participationOrder scopes.

pointsPerWin.description: Simple points-per-win shorthand. Flat number or level-keyed.

finishingPositionPoints.description: Restrict finishing-position points to specific participationOrders

maxCountableMatches.description: Cap on matches that earn per-win points. Per participant per draw. Flat number or level-keyed.

bonusPoints.description: Bonus points for specific finishing positions (e.g., champion/finalist bonuses)

requireWinForPoints.description: Override global requireWinForPoints at profile level

requireWinFirstRound.description: Override global requireWinFirstRound at profile level

stages.description: Draw stages: MAIN, QUALIFYING, CONSOLATION, etc.

participationOrder.description: 1 = primary participation, 2 = secondary (e.g., second doubles event)

priority.description: Explicit priority for deterministic profile selection. Higher values win. When omitted, specificity scoring determines precedence.

PositionValue.description: Polymorphic point value. Resolves to a number through getAwardPoints. Simplest: a flat number. Complex: level-keyed, flight-keyed, draw-size-conditional, or array of conditionals.

PositionValueObject.description: Complex point value with conditional resolution. Array form: evaluated in order, first match wins.

level.description: Level-keyed lookup. Record<level, value|FlightValues> or array indexed by level-1.

flights.description: Flight-keyed lookup. Array indexed by flightNumber-1.

drawSize.description: Specific drawSize this entry applies to

drawSizes.description: Array of drawSizes this entry applies to

threshold.description: When true, applies to drawSizes >= drawSize

requireWin.description: Require a win to earn these points

won.description: Points for winning at this finishing round

lost.description: Points for losing at this finishing round

PerWinPointsDef.description: Points awarded per match won. Can be scoped to specific participationOrders and levels.

level.description: Level-keyed value. Record<level, value|LineValues> or array indexed by level-1.

line.description: Team line-position values (array indexed by line position)

limit.description: Max line positions that earn points

BonusPointDef.description: Bonus points for specific finishing positions (e.g., [1] for champion bonus)

finishingPositions.description: Which finishing positions earn the bonus (e.g., [1] for champion, [1,2] for champion + finalist)

value.description: Bonus value. Flat number or level-keyed.

QualityWinProfile.description: Defines bonus points for wins against ranked opponents. Opponent ranking is looked up from their scaleItems.

rankingRanges.description: Ranking ranges and their corresponding bonus point values

rankingScaleName.description: Which ranking scale to use for opponent ranking lookup

rankingEventType.description: Event type for the ranking scale lookup (defaults to matchUp's eventType)

rankingSnapshot.description: When to snapshot opponent ranking. 'tournamentStart' (default), 'matchDate', or 'latestAvailable'.

unrankedOpponentBehavior.description: Fallback when opponent has no ranking

defaultRank.description: Default rank to use when unrankedOpponentBehavior is 'useDefaultRank'

maxBonusPerTournament.description: Maximum total quality-win bonus per tournament per participant

includeWalkovers.description: Whether walkovers/defaults count as quality wins

QualityWinRange.description: Maps an opponent ranking range to a bonus point value

value.description: Bonus points for a win against opponent in this range

AggregationRules.description: Controls how per-tournament PointAwards are aggregated into a ranking list. Real-world systems count best N results from separate buckets.

countingBuckets.description: Separate counting buckets (e.g., Singles, Doubles). If omitted, all results summed directly.

bestOfCount.description: Global best-of-N across all results. 0 or undefined = count all.

rollingPeriodDays.description: Rolling period in days (e.g., 365 for 52-week ranking)

separateByGender.description: Separate ranking lists by gender (default: true)

minCountableResults.description: Minimum counting results (across all buckets) to receive a ranking

maxResultsPerLevel.description: Max results counted from a single tournament level (e.g., {7: 2} = max 2 from L7)

categoryAggregation.description: Cross-category contribution rules: how awards earned in one category contribute to ranking lists in another. Evaluated at aggregation time.

CategoryAggregationRule.description: How point awards earned in one category contribute to ranking lists in another. Evaluated by generateRankingList at aggregation time.

source.description: Source categories whose awards feed this rule

target.description: Target category that the carried contribution lands in

multiplier.description: Multiplier on source point components (e.g. 0.2 for USTA, 1.0 for full carry). Mutually exclusive with rerateTo.

rerateTo.description: Re-rate the source result against a different award profile. Mutually exclusive with multiplier.

requireParticipationInTarget.description: USTA: must have at least one direct target-category award

minResultsFromTarget.description: LTA: minimum number of direct target-category results required

eligibleSourceWindow.description: Bounded window of eligible source categories relative to target (LTA olderBy: 2)

retentionMonthsAfterAging.description: LTA: months prior-category results remain eligible after aging up

maxCarriedResults.description: Maximum carried results per participant per rule (TE: 2, TA: 3)

subjectToBucketLimits.description: Carried results compete with native for bestOfCount slots (default true)

carryComponents.description: Which point components to carry. Defaults to all.

excludedSourceFilters.description: Exclusion predicates that disqualify source awards from this rule (TA J1000 carve-out)

SourceFilter.description: Predicate that disqualifies source awards from a CategoryAggregationRule

ageEligibility.description: Disqualify when participant has aged out of source by snapshot date

DerivedRanking.description: Ranking list that is a filtered view of another (not independently computed). ČTS U16 = U18 filtered by age.

category.description: The category whose ranking list is derived

DerivedFilter.description: Filter applied to source entries to produce derived entries

excludePlayersAgingUp.description: ČTS rCŽ: exclude players aging up at end of period

ageRange.description: Limit to participants whose effective age is in this range at snapshot date (inclusive)

additionalScope.description: Further category match applied as conjunction

CountingBucket.description: A bucket of results that are counted separately toward the ranking total

eventTypes.description: Which eventTypes feed into this bucket (undefined = all)

pointComponents.description: Which PointAward components to sum. If omitted, sums total points.

bestOfCount.description: How many best results to count (0 or undefined = all)

minResults.description: Minimum results in this bucket required

levels.description: Level filter — only include results from these levels

mandatoryRules.description: Mandatory level results always count, even if worse than optional results

MandatoryRule.description: Tournament levels whose results must always count toward ranking

bestOfCount.description: If set, only best N from mandatory levels count; otherwise all count

CategoryScope.description: Category matching criteria. All populated fields are AND'd. Values within array fields are OR'd.

PointAward.description: Granular point breakdown for a single participant in a single draw. Output of getTournamentPoints.

qualityWinPoints.description: Bonus points from wins against ranked opponents

rangeAccessor.description: Finishing position range accessor used for lookup

RankingListEntry.description: A single entry in a generated ranking list. Output of generateRankingList.

meetsMinimum.description: Whether entry meets minimum counting result requirements

LevelKeyed.description: Level-keyed value: Record<level, T> or T[] indexed by level-1. Prefer Record form.

DoublesAttribution.description: How doubles points are attributed to individuals. 'fullToEach': 100% each. 'splitEven': 50% each. 'teamOnly': pair only.
